title: Cobblemon Utility Additions
description: This project was created to simplify and add another layer to some of the features already included in Cobblemon!
body:
This mod simply adds a few items.

1. Virtual PC. (Use this item to open your PC from anywhere.)
2. Healing Pad. (Use this item to heal your team from anywhere.)
3. Chance Compass. (Use this to check spawn chances near you.)
